chunks.title: Introduction to the Returnees
chunks.reason: Sets the context for the list of exiles returning from Babylon.

chunks.title: People of Israel Returning
chunks.reason: Catalog of families and towns of the common people returning.

chunks.title: Priests, Levites, Singers, and Gatekeepers
chunks.reason: Catalog of the religious officials returning.

chunks.title: Temple Servants and Solomon's Servants
chunks.reason: Catalog of the temple servants and their total count.

chunks.title: Uncertain Lineages and Priestly Status
chunks.reason: Narrative about those with unclear genealogy and the governor's ruling.

chunks.title: Total Population and Livestock
chunks.reason: Summary of the total assembly count and animals brought.

chunks.title: Freewill Offerings for the Temple
chunks.reason: Narrative describing the contributions given by the leaders.

chunks.title: Settlement in Their Cities
chunks.reason: Concluding statement on where the various groups settled.
